linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: COMPLETED at fork c4b9b5b (real gfx90a code object, 18/18 GPU tests x2 runs). This session brought up the remaining ~15 non-JIT modules behind the prior 17-symbol residual and drove the cudf-internal undefined closure to EXACTLY 6: the 2 cudf::detail::binary_operation JIT overloads (jitify->hipRTC is the documented separate effort) PLUS 4 scan_inclusive<DeviceMin|Max> for strings/structs (scoped-out .cu files referenced by the in-scope reductions/scan dispatch; same deferred-dispatch class). Note: nm -D -u | grep 'U cudf' shows only 2 (the scan_inclusive symbols demangle with std::unique_ptr<cudf::column> prefix, not cudf::); use grep on scan_inclusive|binary_operation to see all 6. 9 new TUs added to cudf_hip_sources.cmake: stream_compaction/distinct_count.cu, quantiles/quantile.cu, quantiles/tdigest/{tdigest.cu,tdigest_aggregation.cu,tdigest_column_view.cpp}, groupby/sort/group_quantiles.cu, filling/repeat.cu, reshape/tile.cu, lists/stream_compaction/distinct.cu. libcudf.so = 559.46 MB (586,646,592 B), 151 embedded code objects ALL gfx90a, no -mcmodel=large, no split (--offload-compress stays on). GPU 18/18 on MI250X (GCD 0) x2 runs, stable. find_package(cudf) dependency-export contract GPU-verified. This unblocks cugraph/cuml (also needs raft). src/io (nvCOMP/KvikIO) + the binaryop/transform/rolling JIT stay scoped out. See notes.md + PORTING_GUIDE.

linux-gfx1100.blocked_reason: VALIDATION-FAILED (gfx1100, wave32). Build and 18/18 smoke tests PASS; but the targeted wave32 valid_if_kernel partial-tail check FAILS. Root cause: valid_if_kernel (valid_if.cuh:58) calls tiled_partition<32>::ballot(pred) inside a per-lane while(i<size) loop. For a partial tail (size%32!=0), exited tail lanes do NOT call ballot -- the call is divergent within the 32-lane tile. On gfx1100 (wave32) this causes HSA_STATUS_ERROR_EXCEPTION (hardware exception code 0x1016). On gfx90a (wave64), the 32-lane tile is a sub-wave of the 64-lane wavefront; all lanes execute in lockstep and the ballot is converged at the hardware level. Fix: restructure valid_if_kernel to call ballot_32 unconditionally for all tile members (out-of-range lanes vote false), with the output write guarded by active status. See notes.md 'Validation 2026-06-01' and agent_space/cudf_valid_if_harness/ballot_diverge.cu for the reproducer.
